onboarding.subtitle: För att komma igång, välj en transkriptionsmodell

parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.name: Parakeet V2
parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v2.description: Endast engelska. Den bästa modellen för engelsktalande.

moonshine-base.name: Moonshine Base
moonshine-base.description: Mycket snabb, endast engelska. Hanterar accenter bra.

moonshine-small-streaming-en.name: Moonshine V2 Small
moonshine-small-streaming-en.description: Snabb, endast engelska. Bra balans mellan hastighet och noggrannhet.

breeze-asr.name: Breeze ASR
breeze-asr.description: Optimerad för taiwanesisk mandarin. Stöd för kodväxling.

sense-voice-int8.name: SenseVoice
sense-voice-int8.description: Mycket snabb. Kinesiska, engelska, japanska, koreanska, kantonesiska.

canary-180m-flash.name: Canary 180M Flash
canary-180m-flash.description: Mycket snabb. Engelska, tyska, spanska, franska. Stöder översättning.

canary-1b-v2.name: Canary 1B v2
canary-1b-v2.description: Noggrann flerspråkig. 25 europeiska språk. Stöder översättning.

cohere-int8.name: Cohere
cohere-int8.description: En stor, långsammare, men mycket noggrann flerspråkig modell.

errors.loadModels: Misslyckades med att ladda tillgängliga modeller
errors.downloadModel: Misslyckades med att ladda ner modell: {{error}}

modelSettings.title: {{model}}-inställningar
modelSettings.noSettingsNeeded: Denna modell fungerar automatiskt utan att någon konfiguration krävs.

language.title: Språk
language.description: Välj språk för taligenkänning. Auto kommer automatiskt att bestämma språket, medan val av ett specifikt språk kan förbättra noggrannheten för det språket.
language.descriptionUnsupported: Parakeet-modellen upptäcker automatiskt språket. Inget manuellt val behövs.

models.title: Transkriptionsmodeller
models.description: Välj en transkriptionsmodell eller ladda ner ytterligare modeller. Olika modeller erbjuder varierande nivåer av noggrannhet och hastighet.
models.deleteConfirm: Är du säker på att du vill ta bort {{modelName}}? Du måste ladda ner den igen för att använda den.
models.deleteActiveConfirm: {{modelName}} är din aktiva modell. Om du tar bort den avbryts transkriptioner tills du väljer en ny modell. Är du säker?

postProcessing.title: Efterbearbetning

baseUrl.title: Bas-URL
baseUrl.description: API-bas-URL för den valda leverantören. Endast den anpassade leverantören kan redigeras.

model.title: Modell
model.descriptionCustom: Ange den modellidentifierare som förväntas av din anpassade slutpunkt.
model.descriptionDefault: Välj en modell som exponeras av den valda leverantören.

prompts.title: Prompt

selectedPrompt.title: Vald prompt
selectedPrompt.description: Välj en mall för att förfina transkriptioner eller skapa en ny. Använd ${output} inuti prompttexten för att referera till den fångade transkriptionen.

prompts.promptInstructionsPlaceholder: Skriv instruktionerna som ska köras efter transkription. Exempel: Förbättra grammatik och tydlighet för följande text: ${output}
prompts.promptTip: Tips: Använd ${output} för att infoga den transkriberade texten i din prompt.
prompts.selectToEdit: Välj en prompt ovan för att visa och redigera dess detaljer.
prompts.createFirst: Klicka på 'Skapa ny prompt' ovan för att skapa din första prompt för efterbearbetning.

localLlmAlert.title: Local LLM required
localLlmAlert.body: Toaster post-processing runs against a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint. See docs/post-processing.md for setup.

localModels.title: Local LLM model
localModels.description: Toaster runs LLM cleanup in-process. Pick a model below to download and use locally.

local.label: Local (in-process)
local.description: Runs the cleanup model inside Toaster. No network calls.

postProcessing.localOnlyNotice: Local LLM only — provider URLs are enforced to loopback by the backend (see src-tauri/src/llm_client.rs is_local_host).

debug.title: Felsökning
debug.description: Advanced logging, word-correction thresholds, and internal paths. Useful for troubleshooting transcription, export, or backend behavior.

updateChecks.label: Sök efter uppdateringar
updateChecks.description: Sök automatiskt efter nya versioner av Toaster

appDataDirectory.title: Mapp för appdata
appDataDirectory.description: Plats där Toaster lagrar sina data

acknowledgments.title: Tack till
acknowledgments.intro: Toaster extends its engine with transcript-first video and audio editing capabilities from the following projects.

handy.title: Handy
handy.description: Handy is built on the foundation of Handy by cjpais
handy.details: Handy is an open-source, local-first speech-to-text application. Thank you to cjpais and all Handy contributors.

whisper.title: Whisper.cpp
whisper.description: Högpresterande inferens av OpenAI:s Whisper-modell för automatisk taligenkänning
whisper.details: Toaster använder Whisper.cpp för snabb, lokal tal-till-text-behandling. Tack till det fantastiska arbete som utförts av Georgi Gerganov med medarbetare.

lazyStreamClose.label: Håll mikrofonen öppen mellan transkriptioner
lazyStreamClose.description: Håller mikrofonströmmen öppen i 30 sekunder efter att inspelningen avslutats, vilket minskar latensen för transkriptioner efter varandra. Kan försämra Bluetooth-ljudkvaliteten medan den är aktiv.

translateToEnglish.label: Översätt till engelska
translateToEnglish.description: Översätt automatiskt tal från andra språk till engelska under transkription.

modelUnload.title: Avlasta modell
modelUnload.description: Frigör automatiskt GPU/CPU-minne när modellen inte har använts under den angivna tiden

customWords.title: Anpassade ord
customWords.description: Lägg till ord som ofta hörs fel eller stavas fel under transkription. Systemet kommer automatiskt att korrigera liknande ord för att matcha din lista.

discardWords.title: Discard Words
discardWords.description: Words and phrases that will be automatically removed during transcription cleanup (filler words, verbal tics).
discardWords.duplicate: "{{word}}" is already in the discard list
discardWords.conflictWithAllow: "{{word}}" is in the Allow Words list. Remove it there first.

allowWords.title: Allow Words
allowWords.description: Brand names, technical terms, or unusual words to preserve exactly as-is during transcription.
allowWords.duplicate: "{{word}}" is already in the allow list
allowWords.conflictWithDiscard: "{{word}}" is in the Discard Words list. Remove it there first.

captionSettings.title: Caption Settings
captionSettings.fontSizeDescription: How large the caption text appears (in pixels)
captionSettings.bgColorDescription: The color behind the caption text
captionSettings.bgTransparencyDescription: How opaque the caption background is (0% = fully transparent, 100% = solid)
captionSettings.textColorDescription: The color of the caption text
captionSettings.positionDescription: Where captions appear on screen — 0% is the top, 100% is the bottom
captionSettings.fontFamilyDescription: Typeface used for burned-in captions. Inter and Roboto are bundled so the preview and export render identically on every machine.
captionSettings.cornerRadiusDescription: How rounded the caption pill corners are. Set to 0 for a hard-edged rectangle.
captionSettings.paddingHorizontalDescription: Extra space between the caption text and the left / right edges of the background pill.
captionSettings.paddingVerticalDescription: Extra space between the caption text and the top / bottom edges of the background pill.
captionSettings.maxWidthDescription: How wide the caption is allowed to grow before it wraps onto a second line, as a percentage of the video frame.

tabs.mobileDescription: Styling for portrait / square videos (width < height).

sample.long:
looking crispy and readable
even when the caption text
wraps onto a third line

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.banner: These features are under active development and may change or be removed.

export.title: Export
export.description: Settings that apply when exporting your edited media.

loudness.title: Loudness normalization
loudness.description: Match a target integrated loudness so exported videos sound consistent across players and platforms.

off.label: Off
off.description: No loudness normalization. Exported audio uses the source levels.

podcast_-16.label: Podcast (-16 LUFS)
podcast_-16.description: Broadcast / podcast preset. Targets -16 LUFS integrated.

streaming_-14.label: Streaming (-14 LUFS)
streaming_-14.description: Spotify / YouTube preset. Targets -14 LUFS integrated.

preflight.title: Preflight measurement
preflight.description: Measures the post-edit audio without exporting so you can preview how far off-target it is.
preflight.noMedia: Open a project to run preflight.
preflight.warningOffTarget: Measured loudness is more than 12 LU off the target. Consider re-recording or adjusting the source before export.

format.title: Format
format.label: Output format
format.description: Choose the container and codec for exported media. Audio-only presets drop the video stream.

mp4.label: Video (mp4)
mp4.description: Edited video with H.264 video and AAC audio in an mp4 container. Default.

mp3.label: Audio - mp3
mp3.description: Audio-only mp3 (libmp3lame) at 192 kbps. Most universally compatible audio format.

wav.label: Audio - wav
wav.description: Uncompressed 16-bit PCM in a wav container. Largest file; lossless.

m4a.label: Audio - m4a
m4a.description: AAC audio in an m4a (audio-only mp4) container at 192 kbps. Good for Apple devices.

opus.label: Audio - opus
opus.description: Opus audio (libopus) at 128 kbps. Best quality per bit; modern codec.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Configured-once controls like allow and discard word lists.

words.title: Words
words.description: Discard and allow word lists used across the transcript editor.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Model unload timing and related runtime behavior.

export.title: Export
export.description: Output format, loudness target, and preflight checks for exported media.

experimental.title: Experimental
experimental.description: Opt-in features that may change or be removed. Gated by the master toggle below.

expertMode.title: Expert mode
expertMode.description: Reveals the AI-cleanup connection settings and the Editor's prompt drawer. This is a UI visibility gate only — whether cleanup actually runs is controlled by the separate 'Run AI cleanup at transcription' toggle.

llmConnection.title: AI cleanup (LLM connection)
llmConnection.description: Configure the LLM endpoint that Toaster uses for transcript cleanup after transcription. Local GGUF runs in-process via a downloaded model; custom endpoints point at your own Ollama / LocalAI / self-hosted inference server.

experimentalMaster.title: Enable experimental features
experimentalMaster.description: Master switch for every experiment. When off, individual experiment flags read as disabled even if they were previously turned on. Turning this back on restores your prior selections.

expertMode.title: Expert mode
expertMode.description: Show advanced LLM post-processing controls. When on, a connection-config group appears below and a prompt drawer appears in the Editor. Leave off for the simple editing experience.

footer.portableUpdateMessage: Portable installs cannot be updated automatically. To update: download the latest NSIS installer from GitHub Releases, install it to the same folder, then copy your Data/ folder (settings, models, recordings) from the old version to the new one.

micPermissionDenied.generic: Mikrofonåtkomst nekades av operativsystemet. Bevilja mikrofonbehörighet i dina systeminställningar.
micPermissionDenied.windows: Aktivera mikrofonåtkomst i Inställningar → Integritet och säkerhet → Mikrofon (inklusive åtkomst till skrivbordsappar).
micPermissionDenied.macos: Bevilja mikrofonåtkomst i Systeminställningar → Integritet och säkerhet → Mikrofon.
micPermissionDenied.linux: Bevilja mikrofonåtkomst i systemets ljud- eller integritetsinställningar.

errors.noInputDevice: Ingen ljudenhet hittades. Anslut en mikrofon eller ett headset och försök igen.
errors.pasteFailedTitle: Det gick inte att klistra in texten
errors.pasteFailed: Texten kunde inte klistras in i det aktiva programmet.

editor.noTranscript: Import a media file to begin
editor.importMedia: Click to import a video or audio file
editor.supportedFormats: MP4, MKV, WebM, AVI, MOV, MP3, WAV, FLAC, OGG, and more
editor.modelNotLoaded: No transcription model loaded. Go to the Models tab to download and select one.
editor.transcriptionError: Transcription failed. Please try again or check the console for details.
editor.transcriptionPlaceholder: Import a media file and click Transcribe to begin editing
editor.ffmpegScript: Copy FFmpeg edit command to clipboard
editor.speaker: Speaker {{id}}

exportFormat.label: Export format
exportFormat.tooltip: Pick the output format for this export. Uses your Advanced setting when not overridden.
